text: Hey, if you come later, I will save you a seat.
I do not know what you are doing, but call me when you leave.
Look, I am running late, so start without me.
Are you going to the store, or do you want to stay here?
We appreciate your attention and remain available for any additional inquiry.
The request will be evaluated in accordance with the criteria established in the call.
It is hereby noted that the procedure will enter into force next Monday.
In the event of an incident, the relevant documentation must be submitted in writing.
Rain fell across the town while the dogs slept beside the square.
When she opened the door, she saw the light shiver in the empty hall.
The train left at dawn and carried the valley behind it.
Although nobody spoke, everyone understood that the night would change everything.
